data.title: Penny Stock Equillium Falls After Itolizumab Treatment Fails To Show Improvement In Response Rates In Graft Versus Host Disease Patients
data.description: Equillium's itolizumab showed improved longer-term outcomes in aGVHD despite missing primary endpoints. FDA feedback on potential Accelerated Approval is expected in May.

data.title: Nokia Launches Six New Industry 4.0 Applications To Boost Digitalization
data.description: Nokia expands its MX Industrial Edge (MXIE) platform with six new Industry 4.0 applications. These solutions, including tools from Bosch Rexroth, Ipsotek, and Nozomi Networks, enhance digital transformation in industries by leveraging AI, machine automation, and industrial connectivity for better efficiency and security.

data.title: Tommy Chong, Dr. Peter Grinspoon, Ed Rosenthal Praise New Medical Cannabis Book By Javier Hasse, Nicolás Rodriguez: A Must-Read
data.description: The book "A Guide to Medical Cannabis," written by Javier Hasse and Nicolás Rodriguez and released by Hachette's Sheldon Press, delivers expert insights.

data.title: What's Going On With MicroAlgo Shares Thursday?
data.description: MicroAlgo shares are trading higher on Thursday after WiMi Hologram Cloud  increased its stake in the company.

data.title: What's Going On With SoFi Technologies Stock Thursday?
data.description: SoFi Technologies Inc (NASDAQ:SOFI) shares are trading lower Thursday in possible reaction to Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) announcing new financial services, including Robinhood Banking.
